title: Library Adapter Preparation
author: Franziska Aron
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bem5jc86

steps.title: Prepare P5 adapter ( 100 µL,...
steps.instruction: Prepare P5 adapter ( 100 µL, per reaction ) Use one tube of a 0.2 ml PCR strip to set up the P5 adapter mix. %s %s Gently pipette up anddown to mix. Split the 100 µL reaction into two tubes of the 0.2ml PCR strip with 50 µL, each .

steps.title: Prepare P7 adapter ( 100 µL,...
steps.instruction: Prepare P7 adapter ( 100 µL, per reaction ) Use one tube of a 0.2 ml PCR strip to set up the P7 adapter mix. %s %s Split the 100 µL reaction into two tubes of the 0.2ml PCR strip with 50 µL, each .

steps.title: Prepare oligo hybridization buffer (10× concentration,...
steps.instruction: Prepare oligo hybridization buffer (10× concentration, 1 mL, for 50 reactions ) %s %s The oligo hybridization buffer can be stored at room temperature for up to one year.

steps.title: Combine one P5 adapter reaction with...
steps.instruction: Combine one P5 adapter reaction with one P7 adapter reaction in one tube, mix thoroughly by flicking the tubes with a finger, spin down briefly. Repeat with the second P5 and P7 adpater reaction. In the end you should have two 0.2 ml tubes with a total of 100 µL volume, each containing 50 µL of the P5 adapter and 50 µL of the P7 adapter.

steps.title: Incubate both reactions in a thermocyler...
steps.instruction: Incubate both reactions in a thermocyler with a heated lid at 95 °C for 00:00:10 , followed by a cool down ramp from 95 °C to 12 °C at a rate of 0.1 °C, per sec .

steps.title: Add 1800 µL of UV HPLC-water...
steps.instruction: Add 1800 µL of UV HPLC-water to dilute the double-stranded library adapter mix to 10 micromolar (µM) and aliquot the dilution in 10 × 1.5 ml LoBind tubes, each containing 200 µL . Briefly vortex and spin down before freezing.

steps.title: Combine both reactions into a 2...
steps.instruction: Combine both reactions into a 2 ml tube to obtain a ready-to-use double-stranded library adapter mix with 100 micromolar (µM), adapter (each) .

steps.title: Irradiate the buffer with UV for...
steps.instruction: Irradiate the buffer with UV for 00:30:00 without the lid or with an open lid.

steps.title: Store the adapter mix at -20...
steps.instruction: Store the adapter mix at -20 °C Each aliquot contains sufficient double-stranded library adapter mix for 200 reactions (overall 2000 libraries). The adapter mix aliquot can be thawed and re-frozen with no detriment to the reagent quality.
